name: metaswarm
description: Multi-agent orchestration framework for Claude Code, Gemini CLI, and Codex CLI — 19 agents, 13 skills, quality gates, and TDD enforcement

interface.shortDescription: Multi-agent orchestration, quality gates, TDD, and PR shepherding for Codex
interface.longDescription: Use metaswarm to plan, decompose, execute, review, and shepherd development work with specialized agent roles, BEADS-backed tracking, strict quality gates, and cross-platform support for Claude Code, Gemini CLI, and Codex CLI.
defaultPrompt: Use metaswarm to set up this project.
Use metaswarm to start tracked work on this task.
Use metaswarm to shepherd this PR until it is ready to merge.
